title: 29.5cm Glass Fruit Bowl Large Shallow Crystal Cut Dessert Snack Platter Salad Dish Serving Display
description: Large Glass Fruit Bowl Shallow Dessert Snack Platter Salad Dish Serving Display In the kitchen or on the table, make your fruits look even more fresh with glass bowl. Crafted from heavy-duty transparent glass is this large bowl in a shallow and wide structure with a unique 3D pebbled stone look borders and triangular cut edge, for a perfect centrepiece display of fresh fruits or even sharing portions of food. Dimensions of this large shallow glass bowl are – Height: 8.5cm and Diameter: 29.5cm. This large glass bowl is Dishwasher Safe. PEBBLED STONE LOOK SHALLOW BOWL – Spread your fruit display and let the natural bright colours of fruits stand out with this large shallow glass fruit bowl. Transparent glass embossed with a crystal cut look edge and 3D pebble stone borders to enhance the reflective glass surface, and bounce light to make your fresh fruits always look delicious! DURABLE GLASS BOWL – High-quality glass is what makes this shallow glass fruit bowl extremely durable. The extra thickness of the glass surface and high resistance shall ensure this fruit bowl remain robust and resistant to common damage such as chips, cracks and scratches. Heavy-duty glass makes the bowl feel weighty to always provide balance and stability. MULTIPURPOSE GLASS BOWL – A shallow yet wide size makes this bowl multipurpose for displaying & serving sharing portions of fruit, mixed salad, snack platter, pasta, desserts & more. You can expand the scope of use as you wish and ideal for your a new touch at home, or even gifting purposes.
